assessment.note: He confirms reduced participation in team rituals, which is a strong engagement dip and a mild wellbeing concern.

new_queue.label: Less present rituals
new_queue.name: You said 'less present in rituals' — what shifted there for you?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific change he named in team rituals without presuming the cause.

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
new_queue.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

new_queue.label: Open invitation
new_queue.name: Is there anything on your mind that we haven't made space to talk about?
new_queue.description: Intentionally open; lets them name the thing before the manager assumes.

new_queue.label: Feedback he got
new_queue.name: What feedback do you remember actually hearing from that process?
new_queue.description: Checks what he believes was said versus what may have been inferred.

new_queue.label: Feedback that stuck
new_queue.name: What part of that feedback has stayed with you?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the message he internalized and whether it is shaping his next moves.

new_queue.label: Mentoring fit
new_queue.name: What is mentoring giving you that your core product work is not?
new_queue.description: Tests whether the mentoring program is additive or pulling energy away from his main path.

new_queue.label: Concrete path
new_queue.name: What concrete path forward feels real to you right now?
new_queue.description: Gets him to name the route he actually believes in, rather than an abstract aspiration.

new_queue.label: Next step from me
new_queue.name: What do you need from me to make the next couple of weeks steadier?
new_queue.description: Ends with a direct ask for support and next-step commitment without opening a new topic.
